question.label: Energy read
question.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
question.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

answer: Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.

assessment.note: Pivoted from energy to mentoring as a source of usefulness, so no wellbeing signal is scoreable; also surfaced a concrete mentoring thread worth following.

new_queue.label: Mentoring useful
new_queue.name: You said mentoring is where you still feel useful — what is it giving you?

new_queue.label: Unsaid piece
new_queue.name: What part of that decision feels most unfinished for you now?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
